title: Conflicts of Interest in Research and Development Policy
display_label: Conflicts of Interest in Research and Development
content: Governs the identification, disclosure, review, and management of actual, potential, or perceived financial and non-financial conflicts of interest that could affect — or appear to affect — the design, conduct, or reporting of research and development activities at Morgan State University. Approved by the Board of Regents; compiled in PI Handbook 5 (effective 2024-07-01). Full policy details in PI Handbook 5.
